title: pyrus domugledica
side_effects: Pyrus domugledica can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe allergic reactions, respiratory distress, and cardiovascular instability. Ingesting the plant's toxic compounds can lead to nausea, vomiting, and abdominal pain, potentially resulting in life-threatening conditions like liver and kidney damage. Prolonged exposure to the plant's volatile oils can also cause headaches, dizziness, and confusion, impairing cognitive function and judgment. Furthermore, improper handling of the plant's sap can lead to skin irritation, burns, and infections.
